sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63944" key="lofhfo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λοφ-ηφόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n63944.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">crested</tr_>, of a lark, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:88:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">88.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
